name: aeb-readiness-copilot
description: Pitchable MVP for AEB-ready trade evidence readiness checks.

scripts.build: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && next build
scripts.db:push: DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db RUST_LOG=info prisma db push --skip-generate && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db prisma generate
scripts.demo:reset: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('storage/uploads',{recursive:true,force:true})" && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db RUST_LOG=info prisma db push --force-reset --skip-generate && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db prisma generate && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db prisma db seed
